title: Entity
description: Metadata definition for a Dataverse table (entity). Provides information about the table structure including logical names, collection names, and configuration. Read-only entity type supporting only RetrieveMultiple operations.

entityid.description: Unique identifier of the entity definition.

logicalname.description: Logical name of the entity, used in API requests and programmatic references.

logicalcollectionname.description: Logical collection name of the entity.

entitysetname.description: Entity set name used in Web API URLs to reference this table.

physicalname.description: Physical database table name of the entity.

basetablename.description: Base table name of the entity.

externalname.description: External name of the entity for virtual entities.

externalcollectionname.description: External collection name of the entity.

addresstablename.description: Address table name associated with the entity.

extensiontablename.description: Extension table name of the entity.

reportviewname.description: Report view name of the entity.

parentcontrollingattributename.description: Parent controlling attribute name of the entity.

originallocalizedname.description: Original localized display name of the entity.

originallocalizedcollectionname.description: Original localized collection name of the entity.

isactivity.description: Whether this entity is an activity type.

objecttypecode.description: Object type code of the entity.

componentstate.description: Component state of the entity. 0 = Published, 1 = Unpublished, 2 = Deleted, 3 = Deleted Unpublished.

solutionid.description: Unique identifier of the associated solution.

overwritetime.description: Record overwrite time for internal use.

versionnumber.description: Version number of the entity definition record.
